title: Refund policy
description: Refunds are available for eligible orders within 30 days of delivery. The item must be unused and returned in its original condition.

title: Cancellation policy
description: Customers can cancel an order before it has been packed for shipment. After packing, the customer may need to request a return.

title: Shipping policy
description: Standard shipping usually takes 3 to 7 business days. Tracking details are shared by email after the order ships.

title: Account access policy
description: For account access issues, customers should reset their password first. Support can help if the reset email does not arrive.

title: Billing policy
description: Billing information can be updated by the customer in account settings. Support should not ask for full card numbers.
